title: Crispy Middle Eastern Dates Stir-fry
description: A herbal and crispy dish perfect for date-night enjoyment in the Mediterranean style, featuring a unique blend of chilli sauce, tadka, and aromatic herbs.

ingredients.name: chilli sauce (tadka)
ingredients.notes: For a mild chilli flavor, use 2 tbsp of tandoori masala and 2-3 red chili peppers.

instructions: Toast the dates in a pan with coconut oil for about 4 minutes, until they start caramelizing slightly.
In another skillet, heat a tadka by adding a bit of oil and sautéing the minced ginger, garlic, and cumin powder for about 1 minute.
Add the toasted dates to the skillet along with chopped cilantro. Mix well and cook for an additional 2 minutes until most of the moisture evaporates.
Season with salt and then pour in chilli sauce (tadka), stirring constantly until fully incorporated.
Sprinkle basil leaves on top for garnishing and serve immediately.
